info.description_zh: NextNRG, Inc. 從事提供燃料輸送服務。它為基於應用程式的介面客戶提供了選擇加油時間和地點的能力。它提供柴油、紅柴油和 REC-90。該公司由 Yehuda Levy 和 Michael D. Farkas 於 2019 年 3 月 28 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Quantum Cyber NV is a molecular genetics cancer diagnostic company. The firm is engaged in the developing of market-ready molecular genetic diagnostic solutions for life-threatening conditions. It is involved in the commercializing of its product portfolio in Europe, the United States, and the rest of world. The company was founded on March 08, 2021 and is headquartered in Mainz, Germany.
info.description_zh: Quantum Cyber​​ NV 是一家分子遺傳學癌症診斷公司。該公司致力於為危及生命的疾病開發市場就緒的分子遺傳診斷解決方案。它參與其產品組合在歐洲、美國和世界其他地區的商業化。該公司成立於2021年3月8日，總部位於德國美因茨。

info.description: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the sale, distribution, and marketing of diagnostics test kits and med-tech and personal protective equipment products for the prevention, detection, diagnosis, and risk management of viral diseases with a particular interest in the field of immunology. The company was founded by James Foster and Cameron Shaw in 2013 and is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Virax Biolabs Group Ltd. 是一家控股公司，從事診斷測試套件以及醫療技術和個人防護設備產品的銷售、分銷和營銷，用於病毒性疾病的預防、檢測、診斷和風險管理，特別關注免疫學領域。該公司由 James Foster 和 Cameron Shaw 於 2013 年創立，總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc. is a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and commercialization of immunotherapeutic for cancer indications. Its product pipeline includes galinpepimut-S. The company was founded by Angelos M. Stergiou on April 3, 2006 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: SELLAS Life Sciences Group, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物製藥公司，致力於癌症適應症免疫療法的開發和商業化。其產品線包括galinpepimut-S。該公司由 Angelos M. Stergiou 於 2006 年 4 月 3 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Vestand, Inc. engages in the operation of a Japanese restaurant under the name Yoshiharu Ramen. It offers Japanese ramens, rice bowls, and appetizers. The company was founded by James Chae in 2016 and is headquartered in Buena Park, CA.
info.description_zh: Vestand, Inc. 經營一家名為 Yoshiharu Ramen 的日本餐廳。提供日本拉麵、蓋飯和開胃菜。該公司由 James Chae 於 2016 年創立，總部位於加州布埃納帕克。

info.description: Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. operates as a tanker pool company. It is engaged primarily in the commercial management and chartering of crude oil and refined petroleum product tankers. The company was founded on May 7, 2024 and is headquartered in Piraeus, Greece.
info.description_zh: Heidmar Maritime Holdings Corp. 是一家油輪聯營公司。它主要從事原油和成品油油輪的商業管理和租賃。該公司成立於2024年5月7日，總部位於希臘比雷埃夫斯。

info.description: MacroGenics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development and commercialization of antibody-based therapeutics for the treatment of cancer. Its product pipeline includes Margetuximab, Flotetuzumab, Retifanlimab, Enoblituzumab, Tebotelimab, MGC018, MGD019, IMGC936, and MGD014 for infectious diseases. The company was founded by Scott E. Koenig, Jeffrey V. Ravetch, LeRoy E. Hood, Ruedi Aebersold, and Alan Aderem on August 14, 2000 and is headquartered in Rockville, MD.
info.description_zh: MacroGenics, Inc.是一家生物製藥公司，從事基於抗體的癌症治療藥物的開發和商業化。其產品線包括用於感染性疾病的Margetuximab、Flotetuzumab、Retifanlimab、Enoblituzumab、Tebotelimab、MGC018、MGD019、IMGC936和MGD014。該公司由 Scott E. Koenig、Jeffrey V. Ravetch、LeRoy E. Hood、Ruedi Aebersold 和 Alan Aderem 於 2000 年 8 月 14 日創立，總部位於馬裡蘭州羅克維爾。

info.description: NaaS Technology, Inc. engages in the provision of electric vehicle charging services. The firm maintains an EV charging network in China through its charging network for third-party charging station operators, and the number of public DCFCs (direct current fast charger with 30kW power output or more) connected to its network. The company was founded by Zhen Dai and Yang Wang on July 16, 2013 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: NaaS Technology, Inc. 從事提供電動車充電服務。該公司透過其為第三方充電站營運商提供的充電網路以及連接到其網路的公共DCFC（輸出功率為30kW或以上的直流快速充電器）的數量，在中國維護電動車充電網路。該公司由地震和王陽於2013年7月16日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily performance of XOM. The fund, under normal circumstances, invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the securities of XOM and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide 2X daily leveraged exposure to XOM, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily XOM Bull 2X Shares 尋求 XOM 每日表現的 200%（未計費用和開支）的每日投資結果。在正常情况下，该基金将至少 80% 的净资产（加上任何用于投资目的的借款）投资于 XOM 证券以及掉期协议和期权等金融工具，这些金融工具结合起来为 XOM 提供 2 倍的每日杠杆敞口，这与基金的投资目标一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Fennec Pharmaceuticals, Inc. is a specialty pharmaceutical company. It focuses on the development and commercialization of PEDMARK to reduce the risk of platinum-induced ototoxicity in pediatric patients. The company was founded by Orest W. Blaschuk on September 3, 1996 and is headquartered in Durham, NC.
info.description_zh: Fennec Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 是一家專業製藥公司。它專注於 PEDMARK 的開發和商業化，以降低兒科患者鉑類引起的耳毒性風險。該公司由 Orest W. Blaschuk 於 1996 年 9 月 3 日創立，總部位於北卡羅來納州達勒姆。

info.description: Carlsmed, Inc. engages in the development of AI based technology solutions to the medical industry. Its solutions are utilized as an information database for surgeons using traditional surgical techniques. The company was founded by Mike Cordonnier and Niall Casey and is headquartered in Carlsbad, CA.
info.description_zh: Carlsmed, Inc. 致力於為醫療產業開發基於人工智慧的技術解決方案。其解決方案被用作使用傳統手術技術的外科醫生的資訊資料庫。該公司由 Mike Cordonnier 和 Niall Casey 創立，總部位於加州卡爾斯巴德。

info.description: Kraneshares 2x Long JD Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the ADR of JD.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: JD). Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the Underlying Stock and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide investment exposure to 2 times (200%) the performance of the Underlying Stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Kraneshares 2x Long JD Daily ETF 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為京東公司（納斯達克股票代碼：JD）ADR 每日百分比變化的 2 倍（200%）。在正常情況下，基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於標的股票和金融工具，例如掉期協議和期權，這些金融工具組合起來提供的投資風險是標的股票表現的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Tevogen Bio Holdings, Inc. is a clinical-stage specialty immunotherapy company, which engages in the provision of off-the-shelf therapies for the treatment of infectious diseases, cancers, and neurological disorders. It focuses on its product, ExacTcell, a technology that treats acute viral infections, long-term consequences of viral infections, and viral and non-viral induced cancers. The company was founded in April 2021 and is headquartered in Warren, NJ.
info.description_zh: Tevogen Bio Holdings, Inc.是一家臨床階段的特種免疫治療公司，致力於提供用於治療傳染病、癌症和神經系統疾病的現成療法。它專注於其產品 ExacTcell，這是一種治療急性病毒感染、病毒感染的長期後果以及病毒和非病毒誘發的癌症的技術。該公司成立於 2021 年 4 月，總部位於新澤西州沃倫。

info.description: Snail, Inc. is an independent developer and publisher of interactive digital entertainment. The firm builds a portfolio of games designed for use on a variety of platforms, including consoles, PCs, and mobile devices. Its portfolio of games includes ARK:Survival Evolved, Last Oasis, PixARK, ATLAS, ARKII, Expedition Agartha, ARK Park, Outlaws of the Old West, Dark and Light, and ZCREW. The company was founded by Shi Hai on January 11, 2022 and is headquartered in Culver City, CA.
info.description_zh: Snail, Inc. 是一家互動式數位娛樂的獨立開發商和發行商。該公司開發了一系列專為在各種平台上使用而設計的遊戲，包括遊戲機、個人電腦和行動裝置。其遊戲組合包括方舟：生存進化、最後綠洲、PixARK、ATLAS、ARKII、Expedition Agartha、ARK Park、Outlaws of the Old West、Dark and Light 和 ZCREW。該公司由石海於2022年1月11日創立，總部位於加州卡爾弗城。

info.description: Alphadroid Defensive Sector Rotation ETF seeks to track the total return performance, before fees and expenses, of the AlphaDroid EZ-RO Defensive Sector Rotation Index ("Defensive Sector Index" or the "Index"). The fund manager employs a "passive management" (or indexing) investment approach designed to track the total return performance, before fees and expenses, of the index. The fund invests in various types of U.S. publicly traded ETFs that comprise the index ("Underlying ETFs") and therefore operates as a "fund-of-funds." The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Alphadroid 防禦性產業輪動 ETF 旨在追蹤 AlphaDroid EZ-RO 防禦性產業輪動指數（「防禦性產業指數」或「指數」）在扣除費用和支出之前的總回報表現。基金經理人採用「被動管理」（或指數化）投資方法，旨在追蹤指數未計費用和開支之前的總回報表現。該基金投資於構成該指數的各種類型的美國公開交易 ETF（「基礎 ETF」），因此以「基金中的基金」的形式運作。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Visionary Holdings, Inc. engages in providing private online and in person educational programs and services. It operates through the Life Sciences Business and Artificial Intelligence (AI) Education Services. The Life Sciences Business segment includes health and wellness projects, and anti-aging and high-end medical aesthetics service projects. The AI Education Services segment provides AI-assisted teaching tools, study and immigration visa services, student accommodation, employment placement, and financial support for students pursuing degree-oriented education and vocational education programs. The company was founded by Fan Zhou on August 20, 2013 and is headquartered in Toronto, Canada.
info.description_zh: Visionary Holdings, Inc. 致力於提供私人線上和實體教育計畫和服務。它透過生命科學業務和人工智慧（AI）教育服務運作。生命科學業務板塊包括健康養生項目、抗衰老及高端醫美服務項目。人工智慧教育服務部門為攻讀學位教育和職業教育計畫的學生提供人工智慧輔助教學工具、學習和移民簽證服務、學生住宿、就業安置以及財務支援。該公司由範週於2013年8月20日創立，總部位於加拿大多倫多。

info.description: First Trust Nasdaq Oil & Gas ETF seeks investment results that correspond generally to the price and yield (before the fund's fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq US Smart Oil & Gas IndexTM. The fund will normally invest at least 90% of its net assets (including investment borrowings) in the common stocks and depository receipts that comprise the index. The index is designed to provide exposure to U.S. companies comprising the oil and gas sector that have been selected based upon their liquidity and weighted based upon their cumulative score on three investing factors: volatility, value and growth. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: First Trust 納斯達克石油和天然氣 ETF 尋求與納斯達克美國智慧石油和天然氣指數™ 的價格和收益率（未計基金費用和開支）相對應的投資結果。該基金通常將至少 90% 的淨資產（包括投資借款）投資於構成該指數的普通股和存託憑證。該指數旨在提供對包括石油和天然氣行業在內的美國公司的投資，這些公司是根據其流動性進行選擇的，並根據其在三個投資因素（波動性、價值和增長）的累積得分進行加權。它是非多元化的。

info.description: ImmuCell Corp. engages in the development, acquisition, manufacture, and sale of products that improve the health and productivity of cows for the dairy and beef industries. It operates through the following segments: Scours and Mastitis. The Scours segment consists of the First Defense product line. The Mastitis segment includes the CMT product line consisting of reagents and equipment used for rapid cow-side testing to identify mastitic quarters by detecting elevated somatic cell counts. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Portland, ME.
info.description_zh: ImmuCell Corp. 從事開發、收購、製造和銷售可改善乳製品和牛肉行業乳牛健康和生產力的產品。它透過以下部分運作：腹瀉和乳腺炎。 Scours 部門由 First Defense 產品線組成。乳房炎部門包括 CMT 產品線，該產品線由用於快速牛側檢測的試劑和設備組成，透過檢測升高的體細胞計數來識別乳房病區。該公司成立於 1982 年，總部位於緬因州波特蘭。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2x Long FIG Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of FIG. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of FIG, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund manager will attempt to achieve its investment objective without regard to overall market movement or the increase or decrease in the value of FIG. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍長期Fig 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為Fig 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍（200%）。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的每日槓桿敞口，符合FIG 的價格，與基金的投資目標一致。基金管理人將嘗試實現其投資目標，而不考慮整體市場走勢或圖值的增加或減少。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Kinder Morgan, Inc. engages in providing pipeline transportation of natural gas services. It operates through the following business segments: Natural Gas Pipelines, Products Pipelines, Terminals, and CO2. The Natural Gas Pipelines segment operates major interstate and intrastate natural gas pipelines and storage systems. The Products Pipelines segment is involved in the operation of refined petroleum products, crude oil, and condensate pipelines. The Terminals segment includes the operation of liquids and bulk terminal facilities that store and handle various commodities. The CO2 segment produces, transports, and markets to oil fields that use CO2 as a flooding medium to increase recovery and production of crude oil from mature oil fields. The company was founded by Richard D. Kinder and William V. Morgan in February 1997 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.description_zh: Kinder Morgan, Inc. 從事提供天然氣管道運輸服務。它透過以下業務部門運作：天然氣管道、產品管道、碼頭和二氧化碳。天然氣管道部門運作主要的州際和州內天然氣管道和儲存系統。產品管道部門從事成品油、原油和凝析油管道的營運。碼頭部門包括經營儲存和處理各種商品的液體和散裝碼頭設施。二氧化碳部門生產、運輸並向使用二氧化碳作為驅油介質的油田銷售，以提高成熟油田原油的採收率和產量。該公司由 Richard D. Kinder 和 William V. Morgan 於 1997 年 2 月創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long SATS Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of SATS. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of SATS, consistent with the fund's investment objective. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 SATS 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 SATS 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上投資目的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 200% 的 SATS 價格每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。它是非多元化的。

info.description: CME Group, Inc. operates a derivatives marketplace, which offers a range of futures and options products for risk management. Its exchanges offer a range of global benchmark products across all major asset classes based on interest rates, equity indexes, foreign exchange (FX), energy, agricultural commodities and metals. It offers futures and options on futures trading across asset classes through the CME Globex platform, fixed income trading via BrokerTec and FX trading on the EBS platform. In addition, it also operates CME Clearing, a central counterparty clearing provider. The company was founded in 1898 and is headquartered in Chicago, IL.
info.industry_zh: 財務數據和證券交易所
info.description_zh: CME Group, Inc. 經營一個衍生性商品市場，提供一系列用於風險管理的期貨和選擇權產品。其交易所提供一系列基於利率、股票指數、外匯（FX）、能源、農產品和金屬的全球基準產品，涵蓋所有主要資產類別。它透過 CME Globex 平台提供跨資產類別的期貨和期貨選擇權交易，透過 BrokerTec 提供固定收益交易，並在 EBS 平台上提供外匯交易。此外，它還營運中央對手方清算提供者CME Clearing。該公司成立於 1898 年，總部位於伊利諾州芝加哥。

info.description: Welltower, Inc. is a health care infrastructure company, which engages in seniors housing operations, post-acute providers and health systems to fund the real estate infrastructure. The company's operating business segments include Seniors Housing Operating, Triple-Net, and Outpatient Medical. The Seniors Housing Operating segment operates properties including seniors apartments, independent living and independent supportive living, continuing care retirement communities, and assisted living, Alzheimer's dementia care and includes care homes with or without nursing. The Triple-Net segment properties offer services including independent living & supportive living (Canada), assisted living, continuing care retirement communities, Alzheimer's/dementia care and care homes with or without nursing (U.K.), and long-term/post-acute care. The Outpatient Medical segment invests in and operates outpatient medical buildings including physician offices, ambulatory surgery centers, diagnostic facilities, outpatient services and/or labs. The company was founded in 1970 and is headquartered in Toledo, OH.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 醫療保健設施
info.description_zh: Welltower, Inc. 是一家醫療保健基礎設施公司，從事老年人住房運營、急性期後醫療服務提供者和醫療系統，為房地產基礎設施提供資金。該公司的營運業務包括老年人住房運營、三網和門診醫療。老年人住房運營部門經營的物業包括老年人公寓、獨立生活和獨立支持性生活、持續護理退休社區、輔助生活、阿茲海默症癡呆護理，包括有或沒有護理的護理院。 Triple-Net 部門提供的服務包括獨立生活和支持性生活（加拿大）、輔助生活、持續照護退休社區、阿茲海默症/失智症照護和有或沒有照護的照護機構（英國）以及長期/急性期後照護。門診醫療部門投資並營運門診醫療建築，包括醫生辦公室、門診手術中心、診斷設施、門診服務和/或實驗室。該公司成立於 1970 年，總部位於俄亥俄州托萊多。

info.description: NextDecade Corp. is a development company, which focuses on liquefied natural gas (LNG) export projects and associated pipelines. It develops and manages land-based and floating liquefied natural gas projects in the Gulf Coast with focus on the Rio Grande LNG. The company was founded by Kathleen Eishbrenner in 2010 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣設備與服務
info.description_zh: NextDecade Corp. 是一家開發公司，專注於液化天然氣 (LNG) 出口項目及相關管道。該公司在墨西哥灣沿岸開發和管理陸基和浮式液化天然氣項目，並專注於格蘭德河液化天然氣項目。該公司由 Kathleen Eishbrenner 於 2010 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休斯頓。

info.description: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index (the "underlying index"). The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is composed of at least 30 securities of companies in the energy sector that have powerful relative strength or "momentum" characteristics.
info.description_zh: Invesco DWA Energy Momentum ETF 旨在追蹤 Dorsey Wright Energy Technical Leaders Index（「基礎指數」）的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數由至少 30 家能源產業公司的證券組成，這些公司具有強大的相對實力或「動量」特徵。

info.description: Adial Pharmaceuticals, Inc. engages in the development of therapeutics for the treatment or prevention of addiction and related disorders. It offers the AD04, a selective serotonin-3 antagonist. The company was founded by Bankole A. Johnson and William B. Stilley, III in November 2010 and is headquartered in Glen Allen, VA.
info.description_zh: Adial Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 從事治療或預防成癮及相關疾病的療法的開發。它提供 AD04，一種選擇性 5-羥色胺-3 拮抗劑。該公司由 Bankole A. Johnson 和 William B. Stilley, III 於 2010 年 11 月創立，總部位於維吉尼亞州格倫艾倫。

info.description: Amesite, Inc. is a technology company, which engages in the development and marketing of B2C and B2B AI-driven solutions for the healthcare sector. It provides tools and direct connection with working nurses and caregivers through its brand, NurseMagic. The company was founded by Ann Marie Sastry on November 14, 2017 and is headquartered in Detroit, MI.
info.description_zh: Amesite, Inc. 是一家科技公司，致力於醫療保健產業 B2C 和 B2B 人工智慧驅動解決方案的開發和行銷。它透過其品牌 NurseMagic 提供工具以及與工作護理師和護理人員的直接聯繫。該公司由 Ann Marie Sastry 於 2017 年 11 月 14 日創立，總部位於密西根州底特律。

info.description: Blueport Acquisition Ltd. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 13, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Blueport Acquisition Ltd. 以空白支票公司經營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年1月13日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: ChampionsGate Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 27, 2024 and is headquartered in Monterey, CA.
info.description_zh: ChampionsGate Acquisition Corp. 作为一家空白支票公司运营，其成立目的是与一个或多个企业进行合并、股份交换、资产收购、股份购买、重组或类似业务合并。該公司成立於2024年3月27日，總部位於加州蒙特雷。

info.description: Generation Income Properties, Inc. is a real estate investment company, which engages in the acquisition and management of retail, office, and industrial properties net leased to tenants. The company was founded by David Sobelman in September 2015 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 多元化
info.description_zh: Generation Income Properties, Inc.是一家房地產投資公司，從事收購和管理淨租賃給租戶的零售、辦公和工業房地產。該公司由 David Sobelman 於 2015 年 9 月創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: InMed Pharmaceuticals, Inc. engages in developing small molecule drug candidates targeting the CB1/CB2 receptors. It operates through the InMed Pharma and BayMedica Commercial segments. The InMed Pharma segment focuses on research and development. The BayMedica Commercial segment refers to manufacturing technologies to produce and commercialize bulk cannabinoids for sale as ingredients in the health and wellness industry. The company was founded by Christopher Bogart, Sazzad Hossain, Hyder A. Khoja, and Craig D. Schneider on May 19, 1981 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: InMed Pharmaceuticals, Inc. 致力於開發針對 CB1/CB2 受體的小分子候選藥物。它透過 InMed Pharma 和 BayMedica Commercial 部門運作。 InMed Pharma 部門專注於研究和開發。 BayMedica Commercial 部門是指生產和商業化散裝大麻素的製造技術，以作為健康和保健行業的成分進行銷售。該公司由 Christopher Bogart、Sazzad Hossain、Hyder A. Khoja 和 Craig D. Schneider 於 1981 年 5 月 19 日創立，總部位於加拿大溫哥華。

info.description: Ispire Technology, Inc. engages in the research and development, design, commercialization, sales, marketing, and distribution of branded e-cigarettes and cannabis vaping products. The company was founded on June 13, 2022 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: Ispire Technology, Inc.從事品牌電子煙和大麻電子煙產品的研發、設計、商業化、銷售、行銷和分銷。該公司成立於2022年6月13日，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: Kestrel Group Ltd. engages in provides reinsurance products and services to regional and specialty property and casualty insurers. It operates through the following segments: Legacy Reinsurance, Insurance Programs, and Corporate. The Legacy Reinsurance segment focuses on the results of operations of all businesses of the company and its subsidiaries. The Insurance Programs segment refers to the results of operations of all businesses of Kestrel Group LLC. The Corporate segment relates to the general corporate and management-related expenses of the company and its subsidiaries. The company is headquartered in Hamilton, Bermuda.
info.description_zh: Kestrel Group Ltd. 致力於提供區域和專業財產及意外傷害保險公司再保險產品和服務。它透過以下部門運作：傳統再保險部門、保險計畫部門和企業部門。遺產再保險部門專注於公司及其子公司所有業務的營運績效。保險計劃部門是指 Kestrel Group LLC 所有業務的營運結果。公司部門涉及公司及其子公司的一般公司和管理相關費用。該公司總部位於百慕達漢密爾頓。

info.description: M Evo Global Acquisition Corp II operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 11, 2025 and is headquartered in Farmers Branch, TX.
info.description_zh: M Evo Global Acquisition Corp II 以空白支票公司經營。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月11日，總部位於德克薩斯州法默斯布蘭奇。

info.description: MetaVia, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in developing and commercializing multi-modal disease-modifying therapies. Its pipeline includes ANA001, a proprietary oral niclosamide formulation, Gemcabene, which is assessed as an acute indication for COVID-19, NB-01, a treatment for painful diabetic neuropathy, and NB-02, which has the potential to treat the symptoms of cognitive impairment and modify the progression of neurodegenerative diseases. The company was founded on October 30, 2014 and is headquartered in Cambridge, MA.
info.description_zh: MetaVia, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，致力於開發和商業化多模式疾病緩解療法。其產品線包括 ANA001（一種專有的口服氯硝柳胺製劑）、Gemcabene（被評估為 COVID-19 的急性適應症）、NB-01（一種治療疼痛性糖尿病神經病變的藥物）和 NB-02（有潛力治療認知障礙症狀並改變神經退化性疾病的進展）。該公司成立於2014年10月30日，總部位於麻薩諸塞州劍橋。

info.description: NMP Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on December 18, 2024 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: NMP Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，從事與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於2024年12月18日，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF seeks to track the total return performance of the BlueStar Global Online Gambling, Video Gaming, and eSports Index (the "Index"). The fund employs a "passive management" investment approach designed to track the total return performance of the index. The index is a rules-based index that consists of globally-listed stocks and depositary receipts of digital entertainment companies. Under normal circumstances, at least 80% of the fund's net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) will be invested in companies that derive at least 50% of their revenues from Digital Entertainment. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Pacer BlueStar Digital Entertainment ETF 旨在追蹤 BlueStar 全球線上賭博、電玩和電競指數（「指數」）的總回報表現。該基金採用「被動管理」投資方式，旨在追蹤指數的總回報表現。該指數是一個基於規則的指數，由全球上市股票和數位娛樂公司的存託憑證組成。在正常情況下，至少 80% 的基金淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）將投資於至少 50% 收入來自數位娛樂的公司。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Stoneport Advisors Commodity Long Short ETF seeks to track the performance, before fees and expenses, of the Stoneport Advisors Dynamic Commodity Index - Total Return. The fund invests both long and short, in highly liquid U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts that are contained in the index or that have characteristics that the Adviser believes make their return performance likely to be highly correlated to futures contracts that are contained in the index. The index is a rules-based, quantitative, long-short commodity futures index comprised of liquid, U.S. exchange-listed physical commodity futures contracts. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Stoneport Advisors 商品多空 ETF 旨在追蹤 Stoneport Advisors 動態商品指數 - 總回報（未計費用和開支）的表現。該基金對流動性高的美國交易所上市實體商品期貨合約進行多頭和空頭投資，這些期貨合約包含在指數中，或具有顧問認為其回報表現可能與指數中包含的期貨合約高度相關的特徵。該指數是一種基於規則的定量多空商品期貨指數，由流動性強、在美國交易所上市的實體商品期貨合約組成。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. The company was founded on April 1, 2025 and is headquartered in Darien, CT.
info.description_zh: Solarius Capital Acquisition Corp. 以空白支票公司營運。該公司成立於2025年4月1日，總部位於康乃狄克州達里恩。

info.description: SU Group Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of security-related engineering services, and security guarding and screening services. It operates through the Security-Related Engineering Services and Security Guarding and Screening Services segments. The company was founded by Ming Chan in 1998 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: SU Group Holdings Ltd.從事提供安全相關工程服務及保全及安檢服務。它透過安全相關工程服務以及安全防護和安檢服務部門運作。該公司由Ming Chan於1998年創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or other similar business combination, involving one or more businesses or assets. The company was founded on July 11, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Bluerock Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是實現涉及一項或多項業務或資產的合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或其他類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年7月11日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Alpha Compute Corp. is a technology company scaling the Telegram super app, a strategic reserve of digital assets. The firm implements a comprehensive M&A and treasury strategy that combines direct digital assets acquisition, validator operations, and strategic ecosystem investments to generate sustainable returns for shareholders. The company was founded by Gregory H. Bailey and James Mellon in 1973 and is headquartered in Road Town, British Virgin Islands.
info.description_zh: Alpha Compute Corp. 是一家擴展 Telegram 超級應用程式（數位資產策略儲備）的科技公司。該公司實施全面的併購和財務策略，將直接數位資產收購、驗證器營運和策略生態系統投資結合起來，為股東創造可持續的回報。該公司由 Gregory H. Bailey 和 James Mellon 於 1973 年創立，總部位於英屬維京群島羅德城。

info.description: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF seeks to track the investment results (before fees and expenses) of the Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM Index. The fund generally will invest at least 90% of its total assets in the securities that comprise the underlying index. The underlying index is designed to track the performance of a subset of stocks within the Nasdaq-100 Index (the "Parent Index") that have exhibited the least volatility over the past 12 months, as determined by the index provider. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Invesco QQQ Low Volatility ETF 旨在追蹤 Nasdaq-100 Low VolatilityTM 指數的投資結果（扣除費用和開支之前）。該基金通常將至少 90% 的總資產投資於構成標的指數的證券。基礎指數旨在追蹤納斯達克 100 指數（「母指數」）內部分股票的表現，這些股票在過去 12 個月內波動性最小（由指數提供者確定）。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. is a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 12, 2024 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: M3-Brigade Acquisition V Corp. 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2024年3月12日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Xos, Inc. is an electric mobility company engaged in manufacturing electric trucks. The firm designs and develops fully electric battery mobility systems specifically for commercial fleets. The company was founded by Dakota Semler and Giordano Sordoni on July 29, 2020 and is headquartered in Los Angeles, CA.
info.description_zh: Xos, Inc. 是一家從事製造電動卡車的電動車公司。該公司專門為商業車隊設計和開發全電動電池移動系統。該公司由 Dakota Semler 和 Giordano Sordoni 於 2020 年 7 月 29 日創立，總部位於加州洛杉磯。

info.description: Stran & Co., Inc. engages in the provision of promotional marketing and branded merchandise services. It offers promotional product, custom manufacturing, custom packaging, warehousing, and program management. The company was founded by Andrew Shape and Andrew Stranberg in 1994 and is headquartered in Quincy, MA.
info.description_zh: Stran & Co., Inc. 從事提供促銷行銷和品牌商品服務。它提供促銷產品、客製化製造、客製化包裝、倉儲和專案管理。該公司由 Andrew Shape 和 Andrew Stranberg 於 1994 年創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州昆西。

info.description: Service Properties Trust engages in the provision of hospitality and travel services. The firm owns hotels and travel centers located throughout the U.S., Ontario, Canada, and Puerto Rico. It operates through the Net Lease Investments (Net Lease) and Hotels Investments (Hotels) segments. The Net Lease segment focuses on service-focused retail net lease properties, including travel centers leased to TA. The Hotels segment refers to hotels managed by subsidiaries of Sonesta, Hyatt, Radisson and InterContinental Hotels Group, plc. The company was founded by Barry Michael Portnoy on February 7, 1995 and is headquartered in Newton, MA.
info.industry_zh: 房地產投資信託基金 - 飯店和汽車旅館
info.description_zh: Service Properties Trust 從事提供飯店和旅行服務。該公司在美國、安大略省、加拿大和波多黎各擁有酒店和旅遊中心。它透過淨租賃投資（Net Lease）和酒店投資（酒店）部門運營。淨租賃部門專注於以服務為中心的零售淨租賃物業，包括租賃給達的旅遊中心。飯店部門指由 Sonesta、凱悅、麗笙和洲際酒店集團旗下子公司管理的飯店。該公司由 Barry Michael Portnoy 於 1995 年 2 月 7 日創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州牛頓。

info.description: Farmmi, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in e-commerce and technology enterprises that offer trading platforms for agricultural products. Its products include Shiitake Mushroom, Mu Er Mushroom, and other edible fungi and other agricultural products. It operates through the Sales of Agricultural Products and Agricultural Products Trading Business segments. The Sales of Agricultural Products segment refers to Shiitake, Mu Er, and other agricultural products. The Agricultural Products Trading Business segment includes tapioca, corn, cotton, red dates, and cornstarch. The company was founded by Ye Fang Zhang and Zheng Yu Wang in 2003 and is headquartered in Lishui, China.
info.description_zh: Farmmi, Inc.是一家控股公司，從事為農產品提供交易平台的電子商務和科技企業。其產品包括香菇、木耳菇等食用菌及其他農產品。它透過農產品銷售和農產品貿易業務部門進行運作。農產品銷售板塊是指香菇、木耳等農產品。農產品貿易業務包括木薯、玉米、棉花、紅棗和玉米澱粉。該公司由張曄芳和王正宇於2003年創立，總部位於中國麗水。

info.description: Astronics Corp. engages in the provision of electrical power generation and distribution systems. It includes motion systems, lighting and safety systems, avionics products, aircraft structures, systems certification, and automated test systems. It operates through the Aerospace and Test Systems segments. The Aerospace segment designs and manufactures products for the global aerospace industry. The Test Systems segment designs, develops, manufactures and maintains communications and weapons test systems and training and simulation devices for military applications. The firm's products and solutions include Aircraft Data Systems, Aircraft Electrical Power Systems, Airfield Lighting, Custom Design & Manufacturing, Emergency Systems, Enhanced Vision Systems, IFC Antennas and Radome Systems, Inflight Entertainment System Hardware, Interiors & Structures, Lighting Systems, Seat Actuation Systems, Simulation & Training, Systems Certification, Test & Measurement and VIP IFEC & CMS Systems. The company was founded on December 5th, 1968 and is headquartered in East Aurora, NY.
info.description_zh: Astronics Corp. 從事提供發電和配電系統。它包括運動系統、照明和安全系統、航空電子產品、飛機結構、系統認證和自動化測試系統。它透過航空航天和測試系統部門運作。航空航天部門為全球航空航天工業設計和製造產品。測試系統部門設計、開發、製造和維護通訊和武器測試系統以及軍事應用的訓練和模擬設備。該公司的產品和解決方案包括飛機數據系統、飛機電力系統、機場照明、客製化設計和製造、緊急系統、增強視覺系統、IFC 天線和天線罩系統、機上娛樂系統硬體、內飾和結構、照明系統、座椅驅動系統、模擬和培訓、系統認證、測試和測量以及 VIP IFEC 和 CMS 系統。該公司成立於 1968 年 12 月 5 日，總部位於紐約州東奧羅拉。

info.description: TransAct Technologies, Inc. engages in the operation of a software-driven technology and printing solutions company. The company was founded in June 1996 and is headquartered in Hamden, CT.
info.description_zh: TransAct Technologies, Inc. 從事軟體驅動技術和列印解決方案公司的營運。該公司成立於 1996 年 6 月，總部位於康乃狄克州哈姆登。

info.description: Jpmorgan Healthcare Leaders ETF seeks to provide long-term capital appreciation. The fund will invest primarily in equity securities issued by pharmaceutical, biotechnology, healthcare services, healthcare technology, medical technology and life sciences companies which the adviser believes are leaders and where the magnitude and/or duration of future growth for these companies is underappreciated by the market. Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its assets in the equity securities of healthcare companies.
info.description_zh: 摩根大通醫療保健領袖 ETF 尋求提供長期資本增值。該基金將主要投資於製藥、生物技術、醫療保健服務、醫療保健技術、醫療技術和生命科學公司發行的股票證券，顧問認為這些公司處於領先地位，並且這些公司未來成長的規模和/或持續時間被市場低估。一般情況下，該基金至少80%的資產投資於醫療保健公司的股權證券。

info.description: Precision Optics Corp. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and selling of optical instruments. Its products include microprecision lenses and micro medical cameras, 3D endoscopes, and robotic surgery systems. The company was founded by Richard E. Forkey in December 1982 and is headquartered in Gardner, MA.
info.description_zh: Precision Optics Corp. 從事光學儀器的設計、開發、製造和銷售。其產品包括微精密鏡頭和微型醫療相機、3D內視鏡和機器人手術系統。該公司由 Richard E. Forkey 於 1982 年 12 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州加德納。

info.description: Biomerica, Inc. engages in the development, manufacture, and marketing of medical diagnostic products designed for the early detection and monitoring of chronic diseases and medical conditions. The firm focuses on gastrointestinal diseases, food intolerances, diabetes, and certain esoteric tests. It operates through the following geographical segments: Europe, North America, Asia, South America, and Middle East. The company was founded in September 1971 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Biomerica, Inc. 從事醫療診斷產品的開發、製造和行銷，這些產品旨在早期檢測和監測慢性疾病和醫療狀況。該公司專注於胃腸道疾病、食物不耐受、糖尿病和某些深奧的測試。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：歐洲、北美、亞洲、南美和中東。該公司成立於 1971 年 9 月，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: Prudential Financial, Inc. engages in the provision of insurance, investment management, and other financial products and services. It operates through the following segments: Prudential Investment Management, Inc. (PGIM), U.S. Businesses, International Businesses, and Corporate and Others. The PGIM segment is involved in the provision of investment management services and solutions related to public fixed income, public equity, real estate debt and equity, private credit and other alternatives, and multi-asset class strategies. The U.S. Businesses segment includes retirement strategies, group insurance, and individual life. The International Businesses segment focuses on investing in existing businesses and assessing acquisition opportunities. The Corporate and Other Operations segment relates to the corporate items and initiatives not allocated to business segments. The company was founded by John Fairfield Dryden in 1875 and is headquartered in Newark, NJ.
info.description_zh: Prudential Financial, Inc. 從事提供保險、投資管理以及其他金融產品和服務。該公司透過以下部門運作：保德信投資管理公司 (PGIM)、美國業務部門、國際業務部門以及企業及其他部門。 PGIM部門提供與公共固定收益、公共股權、房地產債務和股權、私人信貸和其他另類投資以及多資產類別策略相關的投資管理服務和解決方案。美國業務部門包括退休策略、團體保險和個人人壽保險。國際業務部門專注於投資現有業務和評估收購機會。公司和其他業務部門涉及未分配給業務部門的公司項目和計劃。該公司由 John Fairfield Dryden 於 1875 年創立，總部位於新澤西州紐瓦克。

info.description: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: D. Boral Arc Acquisition I Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。 The company was founded on March 20, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.

info.description: Militia Long/Short Equity ETF seeks capital appreciation. The fund is an actively managed exchange-traded fund ("ETF") that seeks to achieve its investment objective by investing in both long and short positions in equity securities or ETFs that Militia Investments, LLC, the sub-adviser to the fund (the "Sub-Adviser"), believes offer the potential for capital appreciation. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Militia 多頭/空頭股票 ETF 尋求資本增值。該基金是一檔主動管理的交易所交易基金（「ETF」），旨在透過投資股票證券或 ETF 的多頭和空頭部位來實現其投資目標，該基金的副顧問（「副顧問」）Militia Investments, LLC 認為這些證券或 ETF 具有資本增值的潛力。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Guardant Health, Inc. is a precision oncology company, which engages in the provision of treatment of cancer through the use of proprietary blood-based tests, vast data sets, and advanced analytics. Its solutions include treatment selection, recurrence detection, and early detection. The company was founded by Helmy Eltoukhy, AmirAli H. Talasaz, and Michael Joseph Wiley in December 2011 and is headquartered in Palo Alto, CA.
info.description_zh: Guardant Health, Inc. 是一家精準腫瘤學公司，透過使用專有的血液檢查、大量數據集和高級分析來提供癌症治療。其解決方案包括治療選擇、復發檢測和早期檢測。該公司由 Helmy Eltoukhy、AmirAli H. Talasaz 和 Michael Joseph Wiley 於 2011 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州帕洛阿爾托。

info.description: Barinthus Biotherapeutics Plc is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, which engages in the development of antigen-specific immunotherapeutics that induce T cells to treat chronic viral infections, autoimmune diseases, and cancer. It also focuses on the pipeline of both clinical and preclinical stage therapeutic, and prophylactic programs. The company was founded by Adrian Hill and Dame Sarah Gilbert in March 2021 and is headquartered in Didcot, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Barinthus Biotherapeutics Plc 是一家臨床階段的生物製藥公司，致力於開發抗原特異性免疫治療藥物，誘導 T 細胞治療慢性病毒感染、自體免疫疾病和癌症。它還專注於臨床和臨床前階段治療和預防計劃的管道。該公司由 Adrian Hill 和 Dame Sarah Gilbert 於 2021 年 3 月創立，總部位於英國迪德科特。

info.description: Shengfeng Development Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of contract logistics services. It also focuses on B2B freight transportation, cloud storage, and value-added services. The company was founded by Yong Xu Liu in 2001 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
info.description_zh: 盛豐發展有限公司是一家控股公司，從事提供合約物流服務。它還專注於B2B貨運、雲端儲存和增值服務。該公司由劉永旭於2001年創立，總部位於中國福州。

info.description: PhenixFIN Corp. is an internally-managed non-diversified closed-end management investment company. Its investment objective is to generate current income and capital appreciation. The company was founded on April 23, 2010 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: PhenixFIN Corp. 是一家內部管理的非多元化封閉式管理投資公司。其投資目標是產生當期收入和資本增值。該公司成立於2010年4月23日，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of space launch vehicles. It offers Alpha, Beta, Gamma, and orbital transfer vehicles. The company was founded by Thomas E. Markusic, Mark Watt, and Max Polyakov in January 27, 2017 and is headquartered in Cedar Park, TX.
info.description_zh: Firefly Aerospace, Inc. 從事航太運載火箭的設計與製造。它提供 Alpha、Beta、Gamma 和軌道運輸工具。該公司由 Thomas E. Markusic、Mark Watt 和 Max Polyakov 於 2017 年 1 月 27 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州錫達帕克。

info.description: Journey Medical Corp. is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company, which focuses on the development and commercialization of pharmaceutical products for the treatment of dermatological conditions. Its brands include QBREXZA, Accutane, Targadox, AMZEEQ, Ximino, ZILXI, Exelderm, and Luxamend. The company was founded by Claude Maraoui in October 2014 and is headquartered in Scottsdale, AZ.
info.industry_zh: 藥品製造商 - 特用藥品和非專利藥品
info.description_zh: Journey Medical Corp. 是一家商業階段的製藥公司，專注於治療皮膚病的藥品的開發和商業化。其品牌包括 QBREXZA、Accutane、Targadox、AMZEEQ、Ximino、ZILXI、Exelderm 和 Luxamend。該公司由 Claude Maraoui 於 2014 年 10 月創立，總部位於亞利桑那州斯科茨代爾。

info.description: Wellgistics Health, Inc. operates as a holding company centered around pharmaceuticals and healthcare services. Its business portfolio consists of a pharmacy, wholesale operations, and a technology division with a novel platform for hub and clinical services. The company was founded by Ajjarapu Surendra on September 6, 2022 and is headquartered in Tampa, FL.
info.description_zh: Wellgistics Health, Inc. 以製藥和醫療保健服務為中心的控股公司營運。其業務組合包括藥房、批發業務和擁有新穎的中心和臨床服務平台的技術部門。該公司由 Ajjarapu Surendra 於 2022 年 9 月 6 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州坦帕。

info.description: Graniteshares YieldBOOST Baba ETF seeks current income; exposure to the performance of one or more exchange-traded funds whose shares trade on a U.S.-regulated securities exchange and that seek daily leverage investment results of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage of the ADR of Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: BABA) subject to a limit on potential investment gains. The fund will invest at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in derivatives contracts that utilize the Underlying BABA ETF as the reference asset. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: Graniteshares YieldBOOST Baba ETF 尋求當前收入；接觸一隻或多只交易所交易基金的業績，這些基金的股票在美國監管的證券交易所進行交易，並且尋求每日槓桿投資結果為阿里巴巴集團控股有限公司（紐約證券交易所股票代碼：BABA）每日美國存託憑證百分比的兩倍（200%），但受到潛在投資收益的限制。該基金將至少80%的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於以基礎BABA ETF作為參考資產的衍生性合約。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Kanzhun Ltd. engages in the provision of online recruitment services. It also offers value-added tools to job seekers. The company was founded by Peng Zhao on January 16, 2014 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: 看準有限公司從事提供線上招聘服務。它還為求職者提供增值工具。該公司由趙鵬於2014年1月16日創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Septerna, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in pioneering a new era of G protein-coupled receptor oral small molecule drug discovery powered by proprietary Native Complex PlatformTM. Its pipeline of product candidates focused initially on treating patients in three therapeutic areas: endocrinology, immunology and inflammation, and metabolic diseases. The company was founded by Robert Joseph Lefkowitz, Arthur Christopoulos, Patrick Sexton, and Jeffrey T. Finer in December 2019 and is headquartered in South San Francisco, CA.
info.description_zh: Septerna, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，致力於開創由專有的 Native Complex PlatformTM 提供支持的 G 蛋白偶聯受體口服小分子藥物發現的新時代。其候選產品系列最初著重於治療三個治療領域的患者：內分泌學、免疫學和發炎以及代謝疾病。該公司由 Robert Joseph Lefkowitz、Arthur Christopoulos、Patrick Sexton 和 Jeffrey T. Finer 於 2019 年 12 月創立，總部位於加州南舊金山。

info.description: Innate Pharma SA is a global, clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in developing immunotherapies for cancer patients. Its product pipeline includes Lacutamab, Monalizumab, Avdoralimab, and IPH62. The company was founded by Herve Eloi Dominique Brailly, Eric Vivier, Marc Bonneville, Alessandro Moretta, Jean-Jacques Fournie, and Francois Romagne on September 23, 1999 and is headquartered in Marseille, France.
info.description_zh: Innate Pharma SA 是一家全球性臨床階段生物技術公司，致力於為癌症患者開發免疫療法。其產品線包括 Lacutamab、Monalizumab、Avdoralimab 和 IPH62。該公司由 Herve Eloi Dominique Brailly、Eric Vivier、Marc Bonneville、Alessandro Moretta、Jean-Jacques Fournie 和 Francois Romagne 於 1999 年 9 月 23 日創立，總部位於法國馬賽。

info.description: Pixelworks, Inc. engages in the design and development of integrated circuits used in electronic display devices. It offers consumer electronics and professional display products, video delivery, and streaming solutions for content service providers. Its product categories consist of ImageProcessor integrated circuits (ICs), video co-processor ICs, and transcode ICs. The company was founded by Allen H. Alley, Michael G. West, Kenneth Hunkins, Robert Y. Greenberg and Bradley A. Zenger in 1997 and is headquartered in Portland, OR.
info.description_zh: Pixelworks, Inc. 從事電子顯示設備中使用的積體電路的設計和開發。它為內容服務提供者提供消費性電子產品和專業顯示產品、視訊傳輸和串流媒體解決方案。其產品類別包括影像處理器積體電路（IC）、視訊協處理器IC和轉碼IC。該公司由 Allen H. Alley、Michael G. West、Kenneth Hunkins、Robert Y. Greenberg 和 Bradley A. Zenger 於 1997 年創立，總部位於俄勒岡州波特蘭。

info.description: Primech Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of commercial cleaning solutions. Its cleaning services caters to conservancy areas, educational institutions, airports, facilities, and exteriors of buildings. The company was founded on December 29, 2020 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: Primech Holdings Ltd. 從事提供商業清潔解決方案。其清潔服務面向保護區、教育機構、機場、設施和建築物外部。該公司成立於2020年12月29日，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. operates as a biotechnology company. It focuses on harnessing the immune system to achieve deep and durable clinical responses in cancer. The company uses its proprietary geographically precise solutions platform to rapidly engineer novel molecules, including cytokines and other biologics. Xilio Therapeutics was founded by John C. Williams and Ulrich Rodeck in June 2015 and is headquartered in Waltham, MA.
info.description_zh: Xilio Therapeutics, Inc. 是一家生物技術公司。它的重點是利用免疫系統來實現深度和持久的癌症臨床反應。該公司利用其專有的地理精確解決方案平台來快速設計新型分子，包括細胞激素和其他生物製劑。 Xilio Therapeutics 由 John C. Williams 和 Ulrich Rodeck 於 2015 年 6 月創立，總部位於馬薩諸塞州沃爾瑟姆。

info.description: 5E Advanced Materials, Inc. is an exploration stage company, which engages in the provision of boron and lithium properties in Australia and the United States. It focuses on supplying boron specialty materials, complemented by lithium co-product production. The company was founded on September 23, 2021 and is headquartered in Hesperia, CA.
info.description_zh: 5E Advanced Materials, Inc.是一家處於勘探階段的公司，主要在澳洲和美國提供硼和鋰資源。它專注於供應硼特種材料，並輔以鋰副產品生產。該公司成立於2021年9月23日，總部位於加州希斯皮里亞。

info.description: Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. is a blockchain-native capital marketplace, which engages in connecting origination, funding, and secondary market activity. It operates through the following segments: FTI, Markets, and Other. The FTI segment offers Figure Connect which generates ecosystem and technology fees, and originates, sells, and securitizes home equity line of credit (HELOC) loans that it services. The Markets segment utilizes blockchain technology to develop an exchange for digital assets and credit, with new product offerings including providing interest-bearing stable coin deposits. The company was founded by Michael Scott Cagney and June Ou in 2018 and is headquartered in Reno, NV.
info.description_zh: Figure Technology Solutions, Inc. 是一個區塊鏈原生資本市場，致力於連結發起、融資和二級市場活動。它透過以下部門運作：FTI、市場和其他部門。 FTI 部門提供Figure Connect，該產品產生生態系統和技術費用，並發起、銷售和證券化其服務的房屋淨值信貸額度 (HELOC) 貸款。市場部門利用區塊鏈技術開發數位資產和信用交易，提供新產品，包括提供計息穩定幣存款。該公司由 Michael Scott Cagney 和 June Ou 於 2018 年創立，總部位於內華達州里諾。

info.description: Super League Enterprise, Inc. creates innovative and immersive entertainment experiences, platform and audience monetization and dynamic content feeding channels across the world's top gaming platforms. Fueled by an insatiable desire to stay on the forefront of this ever-evolving meta landscape, Super League pioneer's proprietary digital solutions provide unparalleled access to the global gaming audience. It also creates vibrant in-game communities through the development of innovative experiences and custom content, delivering powerful opportunities for brands and advertisers to achieve impactful insights, and marketing outcomes with audiences of all ages. The company was founded by John C. Miller, David Steigelfest, and Brett Morris on October 1, 2014 and is headquartered in Santa Monica, CA.
info.description_zh: Super League Enterprise, Inc. 在全球頂級遊戲平台上創造創新和沈浸式娛樂體驗、平台和受眾貨幣化以及動態內容供給管道。在不斷發展的元景觀中保持領先地位的永不滿足的願望的推動下，超級聯賽先鋒的專有數位解決方案為全球遊戲觀眾提供了無與倫比的訪問機會。它還透過開發創新體驗和客製化內容來創建充滿活力的遊戲內社區，為品牌和廣告商提供強大的機會，以獲得有影響力的見解，並為所有年齡段的受眾帶來行銷成果。該公司由 John C. Miller、David Steigelfest 和 Brett Morris 於 2014 年 10 月 1 日創立，總部位於加州聖莫尼卡。

info.description: GeoVax Labs, Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development of human vaccines and immunotherapies against infectious diseases and solid tumor cancers using novel proprietary platforms. It focuses on preventive vaccines against hemorrhagic fever viruses such as Ebola-Zaire, Ebola-Sudan, Lassa, Marburg, Zika virus and malaria. The company was founded in June 1988 and is headquartered in Smyrna, GA.
info.description_zh: GeoVax Labs, Inc.是一家臨床階段的生物技術公司，利用新型專有平台開發針對傳染病和實體瘤的人類疫苗和免疫療法。它的重點是針對伊波拉扎伊爾病毒、蘇丹伊波拉病毒、拉沙病毒、馬堡病毒、寨卡病毒和瘧疾等出血熱病毒的預防性疫苗。該公司成立於 1988 年 6 月，總部位於喬治亞州士麥那。

info.description: Check-Cap Ltd. is a clinical stage medical diagnostics company, which engages in the development of ingestible imaging capsule systems for colorectal cancer screening. Its patented technology, C-Scan, is a patient-friendly preparation-free test designed to detect polyps before they may transform into cancer. The company was founded by Yoav Kimchy in 2005 and is headquartered in Isfiya, Israel.
info.description_zh: Check-Cap Ltd.是一家臨床階段醫療診斷公司，致力於開發用於結直腸癌篩檢的可攝入成像膠囊系統。其專利技術 C-Scan 是一種患者友好的免準備測試，旨在在息肉轉變為癌症之前檢測出息肉。該公司由 Yoav Kimchy 於 2005 年創立，總部位於以色列伊斯菲亞。

info.description: Solana Co. is a neurotech company in the medical device industry that focuses on neurological wellness. The firm develops, licenses and acquires non-invasive platform technologies that amplify the brain's ability to heal itself and reduce symptoms of neurological disease or trauma. It engages in the development of the investigational portable neuromodulation stimulator, that delivers neurostimulation via the tongue which has been shown in clinical studies to enhance the effectiveness of physical exercises in people with neurological symptoms from disease or trauma such as mild-to-moderate traumatic brain injury. The company was founded on March 13, 2014 and is headquartered in Newtown, PA.
info.description_zh: Solana Co. 是一家醫療器材產業的神經科技公司，專注於神經健康。該公司開發、授權和收購非侵入性平台技術，這些技術可以增強大腦的自我修復能力並減少神經系統疾病或創傷的症狀。該公司致力於開發正在研究的便攜式神經調節刺激器，該刺激器透過舌頭提供神經刺激，臨床研究表明，這種刺激器可以提高因疾病或創傷（例如輕度至中度創傷性腦損傷）而出現神經系統症狀的人的體育鍛煉的有效性。該公司成立於2014年3月13日，總部位於賓州紐敦。

info.description: Data Storage Corp. engages in the provision of business continuity services. These services include disaster recovery, infrastructure as a service, and cyber security. Its other services and solutions include data protection services, data center and security, voice and data solutions, and email archival solutions. The company was founded by Charles M. Piluso in June 2001 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Data Storage Corp. 從事提供業務連續性服務。這些服務包括災難復原、基礎設施即服務和網路安全。其其他服務和解決方案包括資料保護服務、資料中心和安全性、語音和資料解決方案以及電子郵件存檔解決方案。該公司由 Charles M. Piluso 於 2001 年 6 月創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: TOP Financial Group Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in providing financial market and securities services. It focuses on futures brokerage and other financial services through a trading platform. The company was founded by Jun Li Yang on August 1, 2019 and is headquartered in Hong Kong.
info.description_zh: TOP Financial Group Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事提供金融市場和證券服務。它專注於透過交易平台提供期貨經紀和其他金融服務。該公司由楊麗君於2019年8月1日創立，總部位於香港。

info.description: VNET Group, Inc. operates as a carrier- and cloud-neutral internet data center services provider in China. It provides hosting and related services, including IDC services, cloud services, and business VPN services, to improve the reliability, security, and speed of its customers' internet infrastructure. The firm serves numerous industries, ranging from internet companies to government entities, blue-chip enterprises to small- and mid-sized enterprises. VNET Group was founded by Sheng Chen and Jun Zhang in 1999 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
info.description_zh: VNET Group, Inc. 在中國作為營運商和雲端中立的互聯網資料中心服務供應商運營。它提供託管和相關服務，包括IDC服務、雲端服務和企業VPN服務，以提高客戶互聯網基礎設施的可靠性、安全性和速度。該公司服務於眾多產業，從網路公司到政府實體、藍籌企業到中小企業。互聯星空集團由陳勝和張軍於1999年創立，總部位於中國北京。

info.description: Canary XRP ETF seeks to provide exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust, less the expenses of the Trust's operations and other liabilities and establish its net asset value ("NAV") by reference to the CoinDesk XRP CCIXber 60m New York Rate. The Trust intends to provide direct exposure to the value of XRP held by the Trust with Gemini Trust Company, LLC (the "Gemini Custodian") and BitGo Trust Company, Inc. The Gemini Custodian is a New York limited purpose trust company regulated by the New York Department of Financial Services that provides custody services for digital assets.
info.description_zh: Canary XRP ETF 旨在提供信託持有的 XRP 價值的曝險，減去信託營運費用和其他負債，並參考 CoinDesk XRP CCIXber 60m 紐約匯率確定其資產淨值（「NAV」）。該信託計劃與 Gemini Trust Company, LLC（「Gemini Custodian」）和 BitGo Trust Company, Inc. 直接接觸該信託持有的 XRP 價值。 Gemini Custodian 是一家受紐約金融服務部監管的紐約有限目的信託公司，為數位資產提供託管服務。

info.description: Gemini Space Station, Inc. is a holding company, which offers a mobile and web based crypto asset exchange platform, proprietary wallet infrastructure and custody solutions, over-the-counter trading solutions tailored to institutions and professionals, a digital art auction platform, a proprietary United States dollar backed stablecoin, and a credit card product that offers crypto asset rewards on customer purchases. The company was founded by Tyler Winklevoss and Cameron Winklevoss in 2014 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Gemini Space Station, Inc. 是一家控股公司，提供基於行動和網路的加密資產交易平台、專有的錢包基礎設施和託管解決方案、為機構和專業人士量身定制的場外交易解決方案、數位藝術品拍賣平台、專有的美元支援的穩定幣以及為客戶購買提供加密資產獎勵的信用卡產品。該公司由 Tyler Winklevoss 和 Cameron Winklevoss 於 2014 年創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: WF International Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in the provision of supply, installation, fitting-out, and maintenance services for heating, ventilation, and air conditioning (HVAC) systems, floor heating systems, and water purification systems. The company was founded by Ke Chen in June 2009 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
info.description_zh: WF International Ltd. 是一家控股公司，從事暖氣、通風和空調 (HVAC) 系統、地暖系統和水淨化系統的供應、安裝、裝修和維護服務。該公司由陳柯於2009年6月創立，總部位於中國成都。

info.description: HCW Biologics Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on discovering and developing novel immunotherapies to lengthen health span by disrupting the link between chronic, low-grade inflammation, and age-related diseases. The firm considers age-related low-grade chronic inflammation as a contributing factor to several chronic diseases and conditions, such as cancer, cardiovascular disease, diabetes, neurodegenerative diseases, and autoimmune diseases. The company was founded by Hing C. Wong on April 2, 2018 and is headquartered in Miramar, FL.
info.description_zh: HCW Biologics Inc. 是一家生物製藥公司，專注於發現和開發新型免疫療法，透過破壞慢性、低度發炎和年齡相關疾病之間的關聯來延長健康壽命。該公司認為與年齡相關的低度慢性發炎是導致多種慢性疾病和病症的因素，例如癌症、心血管疾病、糖尿病、神經退化性疾病和自體免疫疾病。該公司由 Hing C. Wong 於 2018 年 4 月 2 日創立，總部位於佛羅裡達州米拉瑪。

info.description: Direxion Daily BABA Bull 2X ETF is a leveraged single-stock exchange-traded fund that targets daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 200% of the daily price performance of the common shares of Alibaba Group Holding Limited. The fund is designed for sophisticated investors to express high-conviction bullish views on the e-commerce and technology giant through the use of aggressive financial derivatives, necessitating active daily monitoring due to the effects of compounding and volatility.
info.description_zh: Direxion Daily BABA Bull 2X ETF 是一款槓桿單一股票交易所交易基金，其目標是阿里巴巴集團控股有限公司普通股每日價格表現的 200%（未扣除費用和開支）的每日投資結果。該基金專為經驗豐富的投資者而設計，透過使用激進的金融衍生品來表達對電子商務和科技巨頭的高度堅定的看漲觀點，由於複利和波動的影響，需要進行積極的日常監控。

info.description: KraneShares 2x Long BABA Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 2 times (200%) the daily percentage change of the ADR of Alibaba Group Holding Limited (NYSE: BABA). Under normal circumstances, the fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in the underlying stock and financial instruments, such as swap agreements and options, that, in combination, provide investment exposure to 2 times (200%) the performance of the underlying stock. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 金瑞股份 2 倍多頭 BABA 每日 ETF 尋求每日投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為阿里巴巴集團控股有限公司（NYSE：BABA）美國存託憑證每日百分比變化的 2 倍（200%）。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款）投資於標的股票和金融工具，例如掉期協議和選擇權，這些組合提供的投資風險是標的股票表現的 2 倍 (200%)。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: GraniteShares 1.75x Long BABA Daily ETF seeks daily investment results, before fees and expenses, of 1.75 times (175%) the daily percentage change of the ADR of Alibaba Group Holding Limited. The fund will enter into one or more swap agreements with major financial institutions for a specified period ranging from a day to more than one year whereby the fund and the financial institution will agree to exchange the return (or differentials in rates of return) earned or realized on the Underlying Stock. It is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: GraniteShares 1.75x Long BABA Daily ETF 尋求每日投資收益（扣除費用和開支）為阿里巴巴集團控股有限公司 ADR 每日百分比變化的 1.75 倍（175%）。基金將與主要金融機構簽訂一項或多項互換協議，期限從一天到一年以上不等，根據該協議，基金和金融機構將同意交換標的股票賺取或實現的回報（或回報率差異）。它是非多元化的。

info.description: Gauzy Ltd. is a light and vision control company, which engages in the development, manufacturing, and wholesale of liquid control glass. It operates through the following segments: Architecture, Automotive, Safety Tech, and Aeronautics. The Architecture segment segment focuses on sales for both interior and exterior applications for commercial, retail, residential, healthcare and hospitality customers. The Automotive segment focuses on sales that enable OEMs to incorporate company's technology into glass rooftops, side windows and windshields to replace conventional mechanical sun visors and shades. The Safety Tech segment focuses on sales of advanced driver assistance systems for buses, coaches, recreational vehicles and specific vehicles, such as camera and motion sensor systems, smart mirrors, and safety doors. The Aeronautics segment is involved in the sale of shading and cabin management systems in private and commercial aircraft, and helicopters. The company was founded by Adrian Lofer, Dimitry Dobrenko and Eyal Peso on October 26, 2009 and is headquartered in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.
info.description_zh: Gauzy Ltd.是一家光與視覺控制公司，從事液控玻璃的開發、製造和批發。它透過以下部門運作：建築、汽車、安全技術和航空。建築部門專注於商業、零售、住宅、醫療保健和酒店客戶的內部和外部應用的銷售。汽車部門的重點是銷售，使原始設備製造商能夠將公司的技術融入玻璃屋頂、側窗和擋風玻璃中，以取代傳統的機械遮陽板和遮陽帽。安全技術部門專注於巴士、客車、休閒車和特定車輛的先進駕駛輔助系統的銷售，例如攝影機和運動感測器系統、智慧後視鏡和安全門。航空部門從事私人和商用飛機以及直升機遮陽和機艙管理系統的銷售。該公司由 Adrian Lofer、Dimitry Dobrenko 和 Eyal Peso 於 2009 年 10 月 26 日創立，總部位於以色列特拉維夫-雅法。

info.description: Hongli Group, Inc. is a holding company, which engages in conducting its businesses through its subsidiaries. Its business operation focuses on the design, production, deep processing, and sales of custom-made profile for machinery and equipment. The company was founded on February 9, 2021 and is headquartered in Weifang, China.
info.description_zh: 紅利集團有限公司是一家控股公司，透過其子公司開展業務。其業務專注於機械設備客製化型材的設計、生產、深度加工和銷售。公司成立於2021年2月9日，總部位於中國濰坊。

info.description: Broadwind, Inc. engages in the manufacture of structures, equipment, and components for power generation, critical infrastructure, and other specialized applications. It operates through the following business segments: Heavy Fabrications, Gearing, Industrial Solutions, and Corporate and Other. The Heavy Fabrications segment provides fabrications to customers in industrial markets. The Gearing segment provides gearing, gearboxes, and precision machined components to customers in onshore and offshore oil and gas (O&G) fracking and drilling, surface and underground mining, wind energy, steel, material handling and other industrial markets. The Industrial Solutions segment provides supply chain solutions, light fabrication, inventory management, and kitting and assembly services, primarily serving the combined cycle natural gas turbine market. The Corporate and Other segment includes the assets and SG&A expenses of the Company's corporate office. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Cicero, IL.

info.description_zh: Broadwind, Inc. 從事發電、關鍵基礎設施和其他專業應用的結構、設備和零件的製造。它透過以下業務部門運作：重型製造、齒輪、工業解決方案以及企業和其他。重型製造部門為工業市場的客戶提供製造服務。齒輪部門為陸上和海上石油和天然氣（O&G）壓裂和鑽井、露天和地下採礦、風能、鋼鐵、物料搬運和其他工業市場的客戶提供齒輪、變速箱和精密加工零件。工業解決方案部門提供供應鏈解決方案、輕型製造、庫存管理以及配套和組裝服務，主要服務於聯合循環天然氣渦輪機市場。公司及其他部門包括公司公司辦公室的資產和銷售、一般管理費用。該公司成立於 1996 年，總部位於伊利諾伊州西塞羅。

info.description: CPS Technologies Corp. engages in the provision of advanced material solutions to the transportation, automotive, energy, computing or Internet, telecommunications, aerospace, defense, and oil and gas end markets. The firm focuses on the design, manufacture, and sale of custom metal matrix composite components. It also assembles housings and packages for hybrid circuit. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Norton, MA.
info.description_zh: CPS Technologies Corp. 致力於為交通、汽車、能源、計算或互聯網、電信、航空航太、國防以及石油和天然氣終端市場提供先進材料解決方案。該公司專注於客製化金屬基複合材料零件的設計、製造和銷售。它還組裝混合電路的外殼和封裝。該公司成立於 1984 年，總部位於馬薩諸塞州諾頓。

info.description: LOBO Technologies Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of electric vehicles. The company designs and develops e-bicycles, e-mopeds, e-tricycles, and electric off-highway four-wheeled shuttles. It operates through the Electric Vehicles and Accessories Sales and Software Royalties and Development, and Design Services segments. The Electric Vehicles and Accessories Sales segment engages in the manufacture and sale of electric vehicles and accessories. The Software Royalties and Development, and Design Services segment provides software solutions development for automotive electronics. The company was founded on October 25, 2021 and is headquartered in Wuxi, China.
info.description_zh: LOBO Technologies Ltd.從事電動車的製造和銷售。該公司設計和開發電動自行車、電動輕便摩托車、電動三輪車和電動非公路四班車。它透過電動車及配件銷售、軟體版稅和開發以及設計服務部門運作。電動車及配件銷售分部從事電動車及配件的製造及銷售。軟體版稅和開發以及設計服務部門提供汽車電子軟體解決方案開發。公司成立於2021年10月25日，總部位於中國無錫。

info.description: Oriental Rise Holdings Ltd. engages in the cultivation, processing, and sale of tea leaves and tea products. It operates through the Primarily-Processes Teas and Refined Teas segments. The company was founded by Chun Sun Wong, Wai Kwong Fong and Deming Zhou on January 25, 2019 and is headquartered in Ningde, China.
info.description_zh: 東方崛起控股有限公司從事茶葉及茶產品的種植、加工及銷售。它透過初加工茶和精製茶部門運作。該公司由Chun Sun Wong、Wai Kwong Fong和Deming Zhou於2019年1月25日創立，總部位於中國寧德。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long GEMI Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of GEMI. The fund is an actively managed ETF. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in the Underlying Security and financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of GEMI, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 GEMI 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（未計費用和開支）為 GEMI 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金是主動式管理ETF。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於標的證券和具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具結合起來提供 GEMI 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc. is a clinical stage biotechnology company, which engages in the development and commercialization of treatments for cancer and diabetes. It focuses on a proprietary cellulose-based live cell encapsulation technology called Cell-in-a-Box, which will be used as a platform for the development of treatments for inoperable pancreatic cancer and other solid cancerous tumors, and diabetes. The company was founded on October 28, 1996 and is headquartered in Las Vegas, NV.
info.description_zh: PharmaCyte Biotech, Inc.是一家臨床階段生物技術公司，從事癌症和糖尿病治療的開發和商業化。它專注於一種名為 Cell-in-a-Box 的基於纖維素的專有活細胞封裝技術，該技術將用作開發無法手術的胰腺癌和其他實體癌腫瘤以及糖尿病治療方法的平台。該公司成立於1996年10月28日，總部位於內華達州拉斯維加斯。

info.description: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc. is an exploration and production company, which engages in selling oil and natural gas products. The company was founded on February 6, 2023 and is headquartered in Midland, TX.
info.description_zh: New Era Energy & Digital, Inc.是一家勘探和生產公司，從事石油和天然氣產品的銷售。該公司成立於2023年2月6日，總部位於德克薩斯州米德蘭。

info.description: Leslie's, Inc. engages in the provision of direct-to-consumer pool and spa care services. It offers equipment installation and repair for residential consumers and professional pool operators. The company was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Phoenix, AZ.
info.description_zh: Leslie's, Inc. 從事提供直接面向消費者的泳池和水療護理服務。它為住宅消費者和專業泳池營運商提供設備安裝和維修服務。該公司成立於 1963 年，總部位於亞利桑那州鳳凰城。

info.description: MicroVision, Inc. engages in the development of laser beam scanning technology. The firm integrates micro-electrical mechanical systems, lasers, optics, hardware, algorithms and machine learning software into its proprietary technology to address existing and emerging markets. It also develops automotive lidar sensors and provides solutions for advanced driver-assistance systems, autonomous vehicles, and non-automotive applications. The company was founded in May 1993 and is headquartered in Redmond, WA.
info.description_zh: MicroVision, Inc. 從事雷射光束掃描技術的開發。該公司將微機電系統、雷射、光學、硬體、演算法和機器學習軟體整合到其專有技術中，以滿足現有和新興市場的需求。它還開發汽車光達感測器，並為先進的駕駛員輔助系統、自動駕駛汽車和非汽車應用提供解決方案。該公司成立於 1993 年 5 月，總部位於華盛頓州雷德蒙德。

info.description: Q/C Technologies, Inc. engages in the provision of energy-efficient blockchain and cryptocurrency infrastructure through quantum-class laser-based computing. The company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Q/C Technologies, Inc. 致力於透過基於量子級雷射的計算提供節能區塊鏈和加密貨幣基礎設施。該公司成立於1989年，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Murano Global Investments Plc operates as a real estate company. The firm owns, develops and invests in hotel, resort and commercial properties. It focuses on capturing value at all stages of the real estate cycle. The company is headquartered in London, the United Kingdom.
info.description_zh: Murano Global Investments Plc 是一家房地產公司。該公司擁有、開發和投資酒店、度假村和商業房地產。它專注於捕捉房地產週期各個階段的價值。該公司總部位於英國倫敦。

info.description: PDS Biotechnology Corp. engages in the development of clinical-stage immunotherapies to treat various early-stage and late-stage cancers, including head and neck cancer, prostate cancer, breast cancer, cervical cancer, anal cancer, and other cancers. Its products include PDS0101 and PDS01ADC. The company was founded by Frank K. Bedu-Addo in 2005 and is headquartered in Princeton, NJ.
info.description_zh: PDS Biotechnology Corp.從事臨床階段免疫療法的開發，以治療各種早期和晚期癌症，包括頭頸癌、前列腺癌、乳腺癌、子宮頸癌、肛門癌和其他癌症。其產品包括PDS0101和PDS01ADC。該公司由 Frank K. Bedu-Addo 於 2005 年創立，總部位於新澤西州普林斯頓。

info.description: Mobix Labs, Inc. operates as a semiconductor company. It develops wireless and connected solutions that are designed to cater to a broad range of applications in markets including 5G infrastructure, satellite communications, automotive, consumer electronics, e-mobility, healthcare, infrastructure and defense. The company was founded on July 31, 2020 and is headquartered in Irvine, CA.
info.description_zh: Mobix Labs, Inc. 以半導體公司營運。該公司開發無線和連網解決方案，旨在滿足 5G 基礎設施、衛星通訊、汽車、消費性電子、電動車、醫療保健、基礎設施和國防等市場的廣泛應用。該公司成立於2020年7月31日，總部位於加州歐文。

info.description: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the research, development, and commercialization of body imaging systems using low energy sound. The company was founded by Avi S. Katz and Raluca Dinu and is headquartered in Novato, CA.
info.description_zh: QT Imaging Holdings, Inc.是一家醫療器材公司，從事低能聲音人體成像系統的研究、開發和商業化。該公司由 Avi S. Katz 和 Raluca Dinu 創立，總部位於加州諾瓦托。

info.description: SUNation Energy, Inc. is focused on local and regional solar, storage, and energy services companies nationwide. The firm's vision is to power the energy transition through the grass-roots growth of solar electricity paired with battery storage. Its portfolio of brands, including SUNation, Hawaii Energy Connection, E-Gear, Sungevity, and Horizon Solar Power, provides homeowners and small businesses with an end-to-end product offering spanning solar, battery storage, and grid services. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Ronkonkoma, NY.
info.description_zh: SUNation Energy, Inc. 專注於全國各地的本地和區域太陽能、儲存和能源服務公司。該公司的願景是透過太陽能發電與電池儲存相結合的基層成長來推動能源轉型。其品牌組合包括 SUNation、Hawaii Energy Connection、E-Gear、Sungevity 和 Horizo​​n Solar Power，為房主和小型企業提供涵蓋太陽能、電池儲存和電網服務的端到端產品。該公司成立於 1969 年，總部位於紐約州朗康科馬。

info.description: Smart Powerr Corp. engages in the provision of energy savings and recycling products and services. It offers waste energy recycling projects for industrial applications and develops a Build-Operate-Transfer model to provide energy saving and recovery facilities for multiple energy intensive industries in China. The company was founded by Guo Hua Ku on May 8, 1980 and is headquartered in Xi'an, China.
info.industry_zh: 公用事業 - 再生能源
info.description_zh: Smart Powerr Corp. 從事提供節能和回收產品及服務。該公司提供工業應用廢能回收項目，並開發建造-營運-轉移模式，為中國多個能源密集型產業提供節能和回收設施。該公司由郭華庫於1980年5月8日創立，總部位於中國西安。

info.description: IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. provides public market investors with broad exposure to the programmable intellectual property economy in a regulated equity format. Its treasury reserve of digital tokens enables direct participation in the Story ecosystem, which supports on-chain registration, licensing, and monetization of intellectual property. The company was founded by Justin B. Stiefel and Jennifer D. H. Stiefel on July 19, 2011 and is headquartered in Gig Harbor, WA.
info.description_zh: IP Strategy Holdings, Inc. 以受監管的股權形式為公開市場投資者提供廣泛的可編程智慧財產權經濟投資機會。其數位代幣的財務儲備可以直接參與 Story 生態系統，支援智慧財產權的鏈上註冊、授權和貨幣化。該公司由 Justin B. Stiefel 和 Jennifer D. H. Stiefel 於 2011 年 7 月 19 日創立，總部位於華盛頓州吉格港。

info.description: JX Luxventure Group, Inc. engages in the design, manufacture, distribution, and sale of casual menswear. It operates through the following segments: Tourism Products, Technology, and Cross-Board Merchandise. The The company was founded by Anna Polemis on January 26, 2012, and is headquartered in Haikou, China.
