info.description: AIFU, Inc. engages in the provision of agency services and insurance claims adjusting services. It operates through the Insurance Agency and Claims Adjusting segments. The Insurance Agency segment includes providing agency services for insurance products and life insurance products. The Claims Adjusting segment provides pre-underwriting survey services, claims adjusting services, disposal of residual value services, loading and unloading supervision services, and consulting services. The company was founded by Yin An Hu and Qiu Ping Lai in 1998 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
info.description_zh: AIFU, Inc. 從事提供代理服務和保險理賠服務。它透過保險代理和理賠部門運作。保險代理部門包括提供保險產品和人壽保險產品的代理服務。理賠分部提供承保前勘察服務、理賠服務、殘值處置服務、裝卸監督服務、諮詢服務。該公司由胡銀安和賴秋萍於1998年創立，總部位於中國廣州。

info.description: SailPoint, Inc. engages in the provision of a comprehensive identity security platform for the enterprise. Its solutions enable organizations to establish, control, and automate policies that help them define and maintain a robust security posture and achieve regulatory compliance. The company was founded by Mark David McClain in 2005 and is headquartered in Austin, TX.
info.description_zh: SailPoint, Inc. 致力於為企業提供全面的身份安全平台。其解決方案使組織能夠建立、控制和自動化策略，幫助他們定義和維護強大的安全態勢並實現法規遵循。該公司由 Mark David McClain 於 2005 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州奧斯汀。

info.description: WEBs Defined Volatility XLE ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLE Index (the "Index"). The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the energy sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs Defined Volatility XLE ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax Defined Volatility XLE 指數（「指數」）表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大型股票市場能源產業公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Nano Labs Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in design and provision of product solution of fabless integrated circuit. It offers high throughput computing chips, high performance computing chips, distributed computing and storage solutions, smart network interface cards, vision computing chips, and distributed rendering. The company was founded in July 2019 and is headquartered in Hangzhou, China.
info.description_zh: Nano Labs Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事無晶圓廠積體電路設計和產品解決方案提供。它提供高吞吐量運算晶片、高效能運算晶片、分散式運算和儲存解決方案、智慧型網路介面卡、視覺運算晶片和分散式渲染。公司成立於2019年7月，總部位於中國杭州。

info.description: Horizon Kinetics Texas ETF is an actively managed equity fund focused on long-term capital appreciation. The fund invests primarily in stocks of companies operating in the oil, gas & consumable fuels industry and the energy equipment & services sectors, across a diversified range of market capitalizations. The investment strategy combines fundamental, value-oriented research with selective growth opportunities to identify companies expected to benefit directly or indirectly from expanding economic opportunities within the State of Texas. The fund targets businesses positioned to capitalize on Texas-specific advantages, including energy sector strength, favorable regulatory conditions, and sustained demographic and economic growth.
info.description_zh: Horizo​​n Kinetics Texas ETF 是一檔專注於長期資本增值的主動管理股票基金。該基金主要投資於石油、天然氣和消耗性燃料產業以及能源設備和服務業的公司股票，其市值範圍多元化。該投資策略將基礎性、價值導向的研究與選擇性成長機會相結合，以確定預計將直接或間接受益於德州不斷擴大的經濟機會的公司。該基金的目標是那些能夠利用德州特有優勢的企業，包括能源產業的實力、有利的監管條件以及持續的人口和經濟成長。

info.description: WEBs Defined Volatility XLV ETF seeks to provide investment results that, before fees and expenses, correspond to the performance of the Syntax Defined Volatility XLV Index. The fund implements its investment objective by investing, under normal market conditions, at least 80% of its net assets (including borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments that achieve the investment results of the index. The index is a rules-based strategy that seeks to track the net asset value of a portfolio of securities of companies in the health care sector of the large-cap U.S. equity market. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: WEBs Defined Volatility XLV ETF 力求提供扣除費用和開支先前與 Syntax Defined Volatility XLV 指數表現相對應的投資結果。該基金透過在正常市場條件下將至少80%的淨資產（包括用於投資目的的借款）投資於實現指數投資結果的金融工具來實現其投資目標。該指數是一種基於規則的策略，旨在追蹤美國大盤股市場醫療保健行業公司證券投資組合的資產淨值。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on October 9, 2024 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Oyster Enterprises II Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，其目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併。該公司成立於 2024 年 10 月 9 日，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Vendome Acquisition Corp. I operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on January 28, 2025 and is headquartered in Park City, UT.
info.description_zh: Vendome Acquisition Corp. I 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年1月28日，總部位於猶他州帕克城。

info.description: BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF seeks capital preservation and current income. The fund invests, under normal circumstances, at least 80% of its net assets (plus the amount of any borrowings for investment purposes) in private credit collateralized loan obligations ("CLOs"). A CLO is a type of asset backed security supported by interest and principal payments generated from a pool of loans, which may include, among others, U.S. and non-U.S. senior secured loans and subordinated corporate loans and privately placed loans. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: BondBloxx Private Credit CLO ETF 尋求資本保值和當前收入。在正常情況下，該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上任何用於投資目的的借款金額）投資於私人信貸抵押貸款債券（「CLO」）。 CLO 是一種資產支持證券，由貸款池產生的利息和本金支付支持，其中可能包括美國和非美國優先擔保貸款、次級公司貸款和私募貸款。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: ConocoPhillips is an exploration and production company, which engages in the exploration, production, transport, and marketing of crude oil, bitumen, and natural gas. It operates through the following geographical segments: Alaska, Lower 48, Canada, Europe, Middle East, and North Africa, Asia Pacific, and Other International. The Alaska segment explores for, produces, transports and markets crude oil, natural gas and NGLs. The Lower 48 segment consists of operations located in the 48 contiguous U.S. states and the Gulf of Mexico. The Canada segment refers to oil sands development in the Athabasca Region of northeastern Alberta and a liquids-rich unconventional play in western Canada. The Europe, Middle East, and North Africa segment includes operations in the Norwegian sector of the North Sea, the Norwegian Sea, Qatar, Libya, Equatorial Guinea and commercial and terminalling operations in the U.K. The Asia Pacific segment focuses on explorations and product operations in China, Indonesia, Malaysia, and Australia. The Other International segment handles exploration activities in Columbia and Argentina. The company was founded by Isaac Elder Blake on November 25, 1875 and is headquartered in Houston, TX.
info.industry_zh: 石油和天然氣勘探與生產
info.description_zh: 康菲石油公司是一家勘探和生產公司，從事原油、瀝青和天然氣的勘探、生產、運輸和行銷。該公司透過以下地理區域開展業務：阿拉斯加、下 48 州、加拿大、歐洲、中東和北非、亞太地區和其他國際地區。阿拉斯加部門勘探、生產、運輸和銷售原油、天然氣和液化天然氣。 Lower 48 部門包括位於美國 48 個鄰近州和墨西哥灣的業務。加拿大部分是指阿爾伯塔省東北部阿薩巴斯卡地區的油砂開發以及加拿大西部液體豐富的非常規油氣田。歐洲、中東和北非部門包括北海挪威部分、挪威海、卡達、利比亞、赤道幾內亞的業務以及英國的商業和碼頭業務。亞太部門專注於中國、印尼、馬來西亞和澳洲的勘探和產品營運。其他國際部門負責哥倫比亞和阿根廷的勘探活動。該公司由 Isaac Elder Blake 於 1875 年 11 月 25 日創立，總部位於德克薩斯州休士頓。

info.description: AngioDynamics, Inc. is a medical device company, which engages in the development, manufacturing, and sale of medical devices for vascular access, surgery, peripheral vascular disease, and oncology. The firm offers ablation systems, fluid management systems, vascular access, angiographic, drainage, thrombolytic, and venous products. It operates through the Med Tech and Med Device segments. The Med Tech segment consists of technology portfolio including Auryon, the thrombus management platform and NanoKnife. The Med Device segment focuses on core, venous, ports, and other oncology products. The company was founded by Howard S. Stern and Eamonn P. Hobbs on February 9, 1988 and is headquartered in Latham, NY.
info.description_zh: AngioDynamics, Inc.是一家醫療器材公司，從事血管通路、外科、週邊血管疾病和腫瘤領域醫療器材的開發、製造和銷售。該公司提供消融系統、液體管理系統、血管通路、血管攝影、引流、血栓溶解和靜脈產品。它透過醫療技術和醫療設備部門運作。醫療技術部門由 Auryon、血栓管理平台和 NanoKnife 等技術組合組成。醫療設備部門專注於核心、靜脈、端口和其他腫瘤產品。該公司由 Howard S. Stern 和 Eamonn P. Hobbs 於 1988 年 2 月 9 日創立，總部位於紐約州萊瑟姆。

info.description: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp. is a blank check company, which engages in the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination. The company was founded on June 26, 2025 and is headquartered in Farmers Branch, TX.
info.description_zh: Evolution Global Acquisition Corp. 是一家空白支票公司，從事合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似業務合併的目的。該公司成立於2025年6月26日，總部位於德克薩斯州法默斯布蘭奇。

info.description: EZGO Technologies Ltd. is a holding company, which engages in selling e-bicycle and battery cells. It operates through the following segments: Battery Cells and Packs, Sales of Electronic Control System, and Others. The Others segment refers to second-hand machineries. The company was founded on January 24, 2019 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.
info.description_zh: EZGO Technologies Ltd.是一家控股公司，從事銷售電動自行車和電池。它透過以下部門運作：電池和電池組、電子控制系統銷售等。其他部分指二手機械。公司成立於2019年1月24日，總部位於中國常州。

info.description: General Purpose Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, amalgamation, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded by Peter Georgiopoulos and Leonard Vrondissis on July 25, 2025 and is headquartered in Millbrook, NY.
info.description_zh: General Purpose Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、合併、股份交換、資產收購、股份購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司由 Peter Georgiopoulos 和 Leonard Vrondissis 於 2025 年 7 月 25 日創立，總部位於紐約州米爾布魯克。

info.description: MDB Capital Holdings LLC is an investment holding company, which engages the provision of a foundational platform specializing in financing startups, partnering with co-founders, and fostering significant value creation. It operates through the following segments: Broker Dealer and Intellectual Property Service, Technology Development, and Other. The Broker Dealer and Intellectual Property Service segment includes Public Ventures and PatentVest. The Technology Development segment is involved in Invizyne. The Other segment focuses on non-income generating subsidiaries for management of the business including MDB CG Management Company, Inc. The company was founded by Christopher Anthony Marlett in 1997 and is headquartered in Addison, TX.
info.description_zh: MDB Capital Holdings LLC 是一家投資控股公司，致力於提供專門為新創公司融資、與聯合創始人合作以及促進重大價值創造的基礎平台。它透過以下部門運作：經紀交易商和智慧財產權服務、技術開發和其他。經紀交易商和智慧財產權服務部門包括 Public Ventures 和 PatentVest。 Invizyne 涉及技術開發部門。其他部門則專注於管理業務的非創收子公司，包括 MDB CG Management Company, Inc.。該公司由 Christopher Anthony Marlett 於 1997 年創立，總部位於德克薩斯州艾迪生。

info.description: SC II Acquisition Corp. operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on June 30, 2025 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: SC II Acquisition Corp. 作為一家空白支票公司運作。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年6月30日，總部位於紐約州紐約。

info.description: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I operates as a blank check company. It was formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company was founded on August 5, 2025 and is headquartered in Miami, FL.
info.description_zh: Lafayette Digital Acquisition Corp. I 是一家空白支票公司。它的成立目的是與一個或多個企業進行合併、股本交換、資產收購、股票購買、重組或類似的業務合併。該公司成立於2025年8月5日，總部位於佛羅裡達州邁阿密。

info.description: Aeva Technologies, Inc. develops sensing paradigm for autonomous vehicles and robotics. The firm offers drones, robotics, vehicle technology, and virtual and augmented reality products. The company was founded by Soroush Salehian Dardashti and Mina Rezk in 2017 and is headquartered in Mountain View, CA.
info.description_zh: Aeva Technologies, Inc. 為自動駕駛車輛和機器人開發感測範例。該公司提供無人機、機器人、車輛技術以及虛擬和擴增實境產品。該公司由 Soroush Salehian Dardashti 和 Mina Rezk 於 2017 年創立，總部位於加州山景城。

info.description: Huize Holding Ltd. engages in the provision of insurance brokerage services through its online platform. It distributes insurance products underwritten by insurer partners and helps them to reach a large number of insurance clients. The company was founded by Cun Jun Ma in August 2006 and is headquartered in Shenzhen, China.
info.description_zh: 匯澤控股有限公司透過其線上平台提供保險經紀服務。它分銷由保險公司合作夥伴承保的保險產品，並幫助他們接觸大量的保險客戶。該公司由馬存軍於2006年8月創立，總部位於中國深圳。

info.description: The Glimpse Group, Inc. operates as technology development company, which engages in the provision of virtual and augmented reality, and spatial computing software and services. The company was founded by Lyron L. Bentovim, Maydan Rothblum, and David J. Smith on June 15, 2016 and is headquartered in New York, NY.
info.description_zh: Glimpse Group, Inc. 是一家技術開發公司，從事提供虛擬和擴增實境以及空間運算軟體和服務。該公司由 Lyron L. Bentovim、Maydan Rothblum 和 David J. Smith 於 2016 年 6 月 15 日創立，總部位於紐約州紐約市。

info.description: Lotus Technology, Inc. engages in the design, development, and sale of battery for electronic vehicles through its subsidiaries. It also sells luxury sports cars under the Lotus brand. The company was founded on August 9, 2021 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
info.description_zh: Lotus Technology, Inc.透過其子公司從事電動汽車電池的設計、開發和銷售。它還銷售蓮花品牌的豪華跑車。公司成立於2021年8月9日，總部位於中國上海。

info.description: Super Hi International Holding Ltd. is an investment holding company, which engages in the restaurant's operation, delivery business, sales of condiment products, and food ingredients located in overseas market outside Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macau, and Taiwan. It operates through the following geographical segments: Singapore, United States of America, Malaysia, Vietnam, and Others. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: 超喜國際控股有限公司是一家投資控股公司，主要從事餐廳經營、外帶業務、調味品及食材銷售，業務分佈於中國大陸、香港、澳門、台灣以外的海外市場。它透過以下地理區域開展業務：新加坡、美國、馬來西亞、越南等。該公司成立於2012年，總部位於新加坡。

info.description: Leverage Shares 2X Long AVGO Daily ETF seeks daily levered investment results, before fees and expenses, of two times (200%) of the daily percentage change in the price of the common stock of AVGO. The fund invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus borrowings for investment purposes) in financial instruments with economic characteristics that, in combination, provide 200% daily leveraged exposure to the price of AVGO, consistent with the fund's investment objective. The fund is non-diversified.
info.description_zh: 槓桿股票 2 倍多頭 AVGO 每日 ETF 尋求每日槓桿投資結果（扣除費用和開支）為 AVGO 普通股價格每日百分比變化的兩倍 (200%)。該基金將至少 80% 的淨資產（加上用於投資目的的借款）投資於具有經濟特徵的金融工具，這些金融工具組合起來可提供 AVGO 價格的 200% 每日槓桿敞口，這與基金的投資目標一致。該基金是非多元化的。

info.description: Fingermotion Inc. is a mobile data specialist company, which engages in the provision of payment and recharge service, data plans, subscription plans, mobile phones, loyalty points redemption, and other product bundles. It operates through the following segments: Telecommunications and Product Services, Value Added Products and Services, Short Message Services and Multimedia Messaging Services, Rich Communication Services Platform, and Big Data Insights. The company was founded on January 23, 2014 and is headquartered in Singapore.
info.description_zh: Fingermotion Inc.是一家行動數據專業公司，提供支付和儲值服務、數據計劃、訂閱計劃、手機、忠誠積分兌換和其他產品捆綁。它透過以下部門運作：電信和產品服務、增值產品和服務、簡訊服務和多媒體訊息服務、豐富的通訊服務平台和大數據洞察。該公司成立於2014年1月23日，總部位於新加坡。
